case_title: PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS BONAFICIO, ELMER V.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONAFICIO, ELMER V. $530.57 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BONAFICIO, ELMER V. HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT SUBMITTED LETTERS FOR CONSIDERATION OF THE COURT.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS
REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED BY DEFT, BONIFACIO ELMER V.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BONAFICIO, ELMER V.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF OCT-26-2001, GRANTED
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS PETITION MAILED ON APR 18, 2002
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY DEFT: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BONAFICIO, ELMER V.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $530.57 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT BONAFICIO, ELMER V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REM: DEFT'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED, TO BE RULED AT TRIAL (PER COMM. KAPLAN).
